description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL skills, covering built-in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and lesser-known gotchas. The teaching tone is enthusiastic and encouraging, aiming to both challenge and teach new tricks. It is designed for developers or database professionals with foundational PostgreSQL knowledge.
Topics: PostgreSQL aggregates, type casting, constraints, PostgreSQL gotchas
Audience: Developers and database professionals familiar with PostgreSQL basics
